[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Taggert''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] officer assigned to the [[Inquisitor (Star Destroyer)|''Inquisitor'']]. He was responsible for searching the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Seldom Different]]'' when it tried to reach the [[Nodgra system/Legends|Nodgra system]].
